examples: The yeomanry are precisely the order of people with whom I feel I can have nothing to do.
The Queen has presented medals to soldiers from The Royal Mercian and Lancastrian Yeomanry in Staffordshire.
The GOP, for its part, now relies on another part of the middle class, what I would call the yeomanry.
The nature of their work also differentiates the clerisy from the yeomanry.
